scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within chemistry and laboratory computation scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: Multi-hazard chemicals now automatically assigned to most restrictive group per updated Common Pitfalls; CAS/SDS resolution path added to Error Handling

reliability.note: Unknown chemicals now include actionable resolution path (CAS lookup, SDS, safety officer); script failure fallback present

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 163 lines — lean; references replaced with real OSHA/NFPA URLs

agent_usability.note: Clear workflow and classification table; compatibility matrix is explicit; error prevention now covers multi-hazard auto-assignment

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable; safety-focused language is appropriate for the domain

security.note: No hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors; pure classification skill

maintainability.note: Clean structure; multi-hazard detection logic documented; adding new chemicals requires only database update

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches for SDS interpretation and synthesis present; no composability documentation

inputs.label: Sort a lab inventory: HCl, NaOH, ethanol, H2O2, KCN, NaCl
inputs.note: Output completed successfully; sort a lab inventory: hcl, naoh, ethanol, h2o2, kcn, nacl case handled within expected scope.

assertions.text: Output assigns each chemical to the correct hazard group
assertions.note: Confirmed: output assigns each chemical to the correct hazard as expected.

assertions.text: Output identifies HCl-NaOH and H2O2-ethanol as incompatible pairs
assertions.note: Confirmed: output identifies hcl-naoh and h2o2-ethanol as incompatible pairs as expected.

assertions.text: Output generates a storage plan with group assignments
assertions.note: Confirmed: output generates a storage plan with group assignments as expected.

assertions.text: Output includes reminder to verify with SDS
assertions.note: Confirmed: output includes reminder to verify with sds as expected.

inputs.label: Check compatibility between concentrated nitric acid and acetone
inputs.note: HNO3 now automatically assigned to most restrictive group (oxidizer) per updated logic

assertions.text: Output identifies HNO3 as both acid and oxidizer (multi-hazard)
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: Output flags HNO3 + acetone as incompatible (oxidizer + flammable)
assertions.note: Confirmed: output flags hno3 + acetone as incompatible (oxidizer as expected.

assertions.text: Output assigns HNO3 to the most restrictive storage group automatically
assertions.note: Common Pitfalls now states multi-hazard chemicals are automatically assigned to most restrictive group

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate compatibility data
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

inputs.label: Sort a chemical with an unknown/novel name not in the database
inputs.note: Unknown chemical now includes actionable resolution path

assertions.text: Output assigns unknown chemical to 'general' group
assertions.note: Confirmed: output assigns unknown chemical to 'general' group as expected.

assertions.text: Output flags the unknown chemical for manual review
assertions.note: Confirmed: output flags the unknown chemical for manual review as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate a hazard classification
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output suggests using CAS number or SDS for authoritative classification
assertions.note: Error Handling now includes: provide CAS number, consult SDS for GHS classification, contact safety officer

key_strengths: Multi-hazard chemical handling now automatic: concentrated HNO3 and similar chemicals assigned to most restrictive group without manual override
Compatibility matrix with reaction risk descriptions provides actionable safety information
Storage requirements table with cabinet types and special requirements is publication-quality
Unknown chemical resolution path now actionable: CAS lookup, SDS GHS classification, safety officer contact
OSHA/NFPA compliance framing with real reference URLs adds regulatory credibility

recommendations.title: No composability documentation for integration with inventory systems
recommendations.problem: The skill has no documented integration points for connecting with lab inventory management systems or LIMS, limiting its use in automated workflows.
recommendations.root_cause: Composability was not addressed in the initial design.
recommendations.fix: Add a brief Integration section documenting the expected input/output format for programmatic use (e.g., JSON input list, JSON output with group assignments and warnings).
